recommendations.title: My Spy
recommendations.overview: A hardened CIA operative finds himself at the mercy of a precocious 9-year-old girl, having been sent undercover to surveil her family.

recommendations.title: Tommy Boy
recommendations.overview: To save the family business, two ne’er-do-well traveling salesmen hit the road with disastrously funny consequences.

recommendations.title: Grudge Match
recommendations.overview: A pair of aging boxing rivals are coaxed out of retirement to fight one final bout -- 30 years after their last match.

recommendations.title: Naked Gun 33⅓: The Final Insult
recommendations.overview: Frank Drebin is persuaded out of retirement to go undercover in a state prison. There he has to find out what top terrorist, Rocco, has planned for when he escapes. Adding to his problems, Frank's wife, Jane, is desperate for a baby.

recommendations.title: Get Smart

recommendations.title: 50 First Dates
recommendations.overview: Henry is a player skilled at seducing women. But when this veterinarian meets Lucy, a girl with a quirky problem when it comes to total recall, he realizes it's possible to fall in love all over again…and again, and again. That's because the delightf

recommendations.title: My Fellow Americans
recommendations.overview: They used to run the country. Now they're running for their lives! Two on-the-lam former Presidents of the United States. Framed in a scandal by the current President and pursued by armed agents, the two squabbling political foes plunge into a desper

recommendations.title: The Longest Yard
recommendations.overview: Disgraced pro football quarterback Paul Crewe lands in a Texas federal penitentiary, where manipulative Warden Hazen recruits him to advise the institution's football team of prison guards. Crewe suggests a tune-up game which lands him quarterbacking

recommendations.title: Spy Game
recommendations.overview: On the day of his retirement, a veteran CIA agent learns that his former protégé has been arrested in China, is sentenced to die the next morning in Beijing, and that the CIA is considering letting that happen to avoid an international scandal.

recommendations.title: Second Act
